summary: Missing ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 and fixtures/artifacts.json referenced by workflow/test-harness, making deliverable non-functional. Run-Cleanup.ps1 line ~25 uses implicit string-to-datetime conversion without error handling; JSON parsing (line ~20) lacks try/catch. Hardcoded NOW_OVERRIDE timestamp in workflow. ArtifactCleanup.psm1 module well-designed with clear policy separation, but system cannot execute without provided files.
